notes: Mistral tRPC ERROR response format test. Instead of faking a data response, return a tRPC error with warning message. Format: [{error:{message:'...',code:-32600,data:{code:'BAD_REQUEST',httpStatus:400,path:'message.newChat'}}}]. Theory: tRPC error handler in Mistral frontend may display the error message to user, or at least produce a different/better error UX than the #322 Error 6002.
